Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 114 

PRVDR_MDL_INITL_NAME 

LABEL: Provider Middle Initial — Individual 

DESCRIPTION: The middle initial of the provider when the provider is a person. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_MDL_INITL_NAME 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_MDL_INITL_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Single character text value (e.g., M); or null/missing
